body:
## Summary
- continue方案C by fixing the Codex provider override shape
- pass `model_providers.openclaw_relay.*` as typed config fields instead of a JSON string
- keep WebSocket disabled for the relay provider and add retries/idle timeout

## Verification
- `npm run build && node --test dist/__tests__/acpx-adapter.test.js` => 26/26 pass
- `npm test` => 673/673 pass

## Context
PR #8 proved Codex sees the custom provider override, but CLI config rejected the JSON-string value: `expected struct ModelProviderInfo`. This patch sends individual TOML-style config keys.
title: Pass Codex relay provider as config fields
